title: Iran War Live Updates: Uncertainty Hangs Over Talks as U.S. Says It Is Close to Agreement
summary_full: An emerging “memorandum of understanding,” which could lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, still needs approval from President Trump, and Iran has not confirmed any commitments.
summary_public: An emerging “memorandum of understanding,” which could lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, still needs approval from President Trump, and Iran has not confirmed any commitments.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Iran has not confirmed any commitments
